title: User Habit Registry
description: Schema for explicit habit registry rules used by the user-habit interpretation layer.

phrase.description: The explicit shorthand phrase to match.

normalized_intent.description: Project-agnostic intent hint produced when the phrase matches.

scenario_bias.description: Scenario hints that can slightly increase confidence for this rule.

confidence.description: Base confidence score for the rule before scenario or context bonuses.

match_type.description: Optional preferred match type for the rule.

preferred_terms.description: Optional downstream-preferred labels associated with this rule.

disambiguation_hints.description: Optional hints explaining what clarification would reduce ambiguity.

notes.description: Optional short notes explaining why the rule exists.

clarify_below.description: Optional per-rule clarification threshold for under-specified phrases.
